name: Double Chocolate Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Butter or margarine, room temperature
1 cup Chocolate chips coated in All-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 20 minutes. Baking time: about 50 minutes.
Oven temperature: 350 degrees F.
This cake is rich and moist, keeping well for some time when stored properly in a covered cake tin or wrapped in plastic in the refrigerator.
For one 10-inch cake:
1. Cream butter with sugars until smooth and well blended.
2. Add chocolate and eggs, one at a time, beating until fluffy.
3. Mix flour and baking soda. Add to creamed mixture.
4. Blend in buttermilk and vanilla; stir until smooth. Add chocolate chips.
5. Turn batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube baking pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 40 to 50 minutes, or until a cake tester comes out clean.
7. Let cool in the pan for a couple of minutes.
8. Turn cake out onto a wire rack; let cool completely.
9. Garnish with fresh sliced strawberries or other berries.
10. Serve with a dollop of whipped cream.
